testcase.name: orderTotalShouldSumAllSubtotals
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-06 07:20:03.802 [main] DEBUG c.t.ordermanagement.model.OrderItem - Calculated subtotal for product P1: 50.0 x 2 = 100.0 2026-04-06 07:20:03.803 [main] DEBUG c.t.ordermanagement.model.OrderItem - Calculated subtotal for product P2: 30.0 x 3 = 90.0 2026-04-06 07:20:03.803 [main] INFO c.tecmx.ordermanagement.model.Order - Calculated total for order O1: 190.0

testcase.name: orderItemSubtotalShouldBeCorrect
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-06 07:20:03.815 [main] DEBUG c.t.ordermanagement.model.OrderItem - Calculated subtotal for product P1: 100.0 x 3 = 300.0
